raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/25 {$610.00} charge at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$1000.00} Charge at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Both charges we made while card was in my possession at all times. 

Charges were made at multiple locations though I have time stamp specific to other charges that I made and are valid on the same card at an alternate location. 

Each above referenced fraudulent charges were each given different explanations for our fraud denial, inconsistent and to be honest sloppy. It would appear this has not been properly investigated by card company JetBlue Barclays. 

Each of the letters submitted by Barclays references different accounts creating confusion and further confirming our concerns related to review of this file adequately.
